description:
#ICICIGI #StockAnalysis #Opportunity #AshishSingh

In this video, we will do detailed analysis of ICICI Lombard General Insurance Company which is one of the market leader in General Insurance Sector.
Discussion Points:
-- Overall Market of General Insurance
-- Future Growth Prospect 
-- Fundamental Analysis of Company
-- Financial Analysis of Company
-- Technical Chart Analysis to identify Potential Gain

Disclaimer - This is an educational video and not a recommendation to buy or sell. Kindly do your due diligence before making any positions in stocks.

fulltitle: ICICI Lombard Stock Analysis | Vale Buying Opportunity

comments.text: Promoter holding and free cash flow are decreasing. What would you pick between SBI Life Insurance Company Ltd and ICICI Lombard General Insurance Company Ltd?
comments.author: @abirkumardas5575

comments.text:
Hi Abir, yes you have rightly identified that promoters holding and free cash flow has been decreased in last few quarters. However, promoters holdings was slightly decreased which was shifted to HNI/ DIIs. And due to increased claims in recent past their cash flow and profit has been hit. 
Regarding SBI life and ICICI Lombard, we cannot compare the two as both have different products although they are insurance company.
comments.author: @ashishsingh-vittaropan1612
